title: lithocardium dodecandrum
intro: Lithocardium dodecandrum, also known as Lithospermum dodecandrum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its content of alkaloids and saponins. Lithocardium dodecandrum has been used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension, cardiovascular disease, and digestive issues, due to its vasodilatory and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote cardiovascular health and reduce oxidative stress.
